description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian dressed in loose, knee-length athletic shorts and a fitted top, with visible muscular legs. The figure is wearing high-top athletic sneakers and mid-calf socks, suggesting a sporty or casual urban style. The shorts have a distinct side stripe, and the shoes feature a lace-up design with a reinforced toe and heel. The posture is dynamic, with legs slightly apart and knees bent, as if in mid-motion or preparing to move. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the upper body and head are not shown in these views. The overall appearance is that of an active adult, likely male, ready for movement in an urban environment.
description: An athletic adult pedestrian in loose shorts and high-top sneakers, standing with knees bent in a dynamic pose. The figure is dressed in sporty attire suitable for urban activity.
description_view_0: Front view showing loose shorts, bent knees, and high-top sneakers with visible laces.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side stripe on the shorts and the profile of the high-top sneaker.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shorts, calves, and the heel design of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side stripe on the shorts and the sneaker profile from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear with loose knee-length shorts and a fitted top
